title: Madras to Madurai Lyrics Aambala Song Lyrics
singerName: Kailash Kher, Maria Ree Vincent, Vishnupriya
stanzas:
Madras to Madurai Song Lyrics From Aambala
Singer(s): Kailash Kher, Vishnu Priya & Maria Roe Vincent
Music: Hip Hop Tamizha

Naan comman-aana aambala
naan kadhalicha pombala
kavuthuputtu ponaale
en nenju thaangala.

Naan dhinamum yaenguren
en nenjula unna thaanguren.
Nee paakkaamale ponadhaale
nondhu saaguren.

Adiye un kannam thakkaali sevappu
adiye en kannam konjamthaan
karuppu.

Irudhum enmela yaen indha
veruppu.
oorukkulla kaettu paaru
maaman thaan neruppu.

Madras to Madurai
oorellaam adhura
machchaan ne nadandhu vandhaa
en nenju sedhara.

en pol yaaringa
kattazhagu pombala.
neethaan eppodhum
enakkaetha aambala.
aambala....

Naan vandhaeney
poo thandhaeney
yen sendhaeney
vaadi en ponmaaneey.

yen raja nee
un roja naan
en nenjellaam
aagidhada....

Adiye enna paathu
ippadiye sollura.
rendu kannaala
ippadi mellura.

Summa vitta nee
rombathaan thullura
kitta vandhaakka
yaenda enna thallura.

Adiye un kannam thakkaali sevappu
adiye en kannam konjamthaan
karuppu.

Irudhum enmela yaen indha
veruppu.
oorukkulla kaettu paaru
maaman thaan neruppu.

Madras to Madurai
oorellaam adhura
machchaan ne nadandhu vandhaa
en nenju sedhara.

en pol yaaringa
kattazhagu pombala.
neethaan eppodhum
enakkaetha aambala.
aambala....

Vaa en munnaal
ava kannaala
kadhala sonnaala
yenmela yenmela

Madras to Madurai
oorellaam adhura
machchaan ne nadandhu vandhaa
en nenju sedhara.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Madras to Madurai'?

The song conveys a lively and playful narrative about love and attraction, capturing the essence of youthful romance.

How does 'Madras to Madurai' fit into the plot of Aambala?

This song is a celebration of love and joy, reflecting the characters' emotions and the festive atmosphere in the movie.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Kailash Kher, Maria Ree Vincent, and Vishnupriya.

Who composed the music for 'Madras to Madurai'?

The music for this energetic track was composed by Hip Hop Tamizha.

When was 'Madras to Madurai' released?

The song was released on December 27, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Aambala, the song Madras to Madurai serves as a lively anthem celebrating love and youthful exuberance. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of joy and excitement, making it perfect for festive occasions. The collaboration of Kailash Kher, Maria Ree Vincent, and Vishnupriya adds a unique flavor to the track, enhancing its appeal. Overall, the song encapsulates the vibrant spirit of romance and celebration, resonating with audiences looking for a fun and energetic experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Madras to Madurai from Aambala is a vibrant celebration of love and energy, featuring an electrifying collaboration between Kailash Kher and the dynamic duo of Maria Ree Vincent and Vishnupriya. With Hip Hop Tamizha's infectious beats, this song is sure to get you moving and grooving. Experience the joy and excitement that this catchy tune brings to every occasion!
stanzaMeanings: I am a common guy, if I fall in love, my heart cannot bear it.
Every day I think of you in my heart. If you don't look at me, I feel sad.
Your eyes are like red tomatoes, and my eyes are just a little dark.
Why this anger towards me? In the village, look at the uncle, he is like fire.
From Madras to Madurai, everyone is like this, if you come walking, my heart will melt.
Who else is as beautiful as me? You are always my darling.
I have come, I have brought flowers, I have come for you, my dear.
You are my king, and I am your rose, all my heart is yours....
Look at me, this is how I say it. With two eyes, I say it softly.
If you leave me, you will jump around, but why do you push me when you come?
Your eyes are like red tomatoes, and my eyes are just a little dark.
Why this anger towards me? In the village, look at the uncle, he is like fire.
From Madras to Madurai, everyone is like this, if you come walking, my heart will melt.
Who else is as beautiful as me? You are always my darling.
Because of you, I have come here, I have come here.
Come, before me, she said love, over me, over me.
The pain is hidden in the wine glass, my heart knows it well.
Let it happen, let it go, love's sorrow is hidden with the pain.
From Madras to Madurai, everyone is like this, if you come walking, my heart will melt.
